name: Salmon Oysters
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Canned salmon or freshly-cooked (preferably sockeye)
1/2 cup Flour or flour crackers mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from the salmon and retain it.
2. Mince the salmon, removing any dark skin.
3. Add the well-beaten eggs and retained salmon juice to the minced salmon.
4. Mix in the flour, salt, pepper, and baking powder until well combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls (or chill and shape into oblong oyster shapes) of the mixture into hot oil.
6. Turn the oysters regularly until both sides are browned.
7. Serve with french fries, coleslaw, and tarter sauce.
